title: Part Feeding CalWiz Purge Calibration
description:
Part Feeding CalWiz Purge Calibration

Purge Calibration

The purge calibration is performed when IF-80 is selected and Purge is Enabled.

(1) Add the number of parts specified in the instructions to the feeder, and then click the <Run> button.

(2) Click the <Yes> button.  This starts the calibration process.

(3) Click the <Next> button.
